question: Will I reach 1,175,000 Energy Points on Khan Academy by the end of May?
reason: Achieving 1,175,000 Energy Points by May 31, 2026, requires an average of 2,487 correct answers or 249 videos watched daily.
evidence: Users earn 75 Energy Points per correct answer and 750 points per first-time video watched. ([support.khanacademy.org](https://support.khanacademy.org/hc/en-us/articles/202487710-What-are-energy-?utm_source=openai))
Achieving 1,175,000 Energy Points from 988,491 requires an additional 186,509 points.
To earn 186,509 points, one would need approximately 2,487 correct answers or 249 videos watched daily over the next 5 days.
